# prosECCo75 topology fixtures

These files are a pinned subset of the
[prosECCo75 repository](https://gitlab.com/sparkly/prosecco/prosECCo75)
at commit
[`e4831a4dbd48face399150bb1c59fefb23c4dd0b`](https://gitlab.com/sparkly/prosecco/prosECCo75/-/tree/e4831a4dbd48face399150bb1c59fefb23c4dd0b).
prosECCo75 is a CHARMM36-derived force field with 0.75 charge scaling.

The copied upstream files are:

- [`UPSTREAM-README.md`](https://gitlab.com/sparkly/prosecco/prosECCo75/-/blob/e4831a4dbd48face399150bb1c59fefb23c4dd0b/README.md)
- [`forcefield.itp`](https://gitlab.com/sparkly/prosecco/prosECCo75/-/blob/e4831a4dbd48face399150bb1c59fefb23c4dd0b/top/charmm36s-feb2021-prosECCo75.ff/forcefield.itp)
- [`ffnonbonded.itp`](https://gitlab.com/sparkly/prosecco/prosECCo75/-/blob/e4831a4dbd48face399150bb1c59fefb23c4dd0b/top/charmm36s-feb2021-prosECCo75.ff/ffnonbonded.itp)
- [`ffbonded.itp`](https://gitlab.com/sparkly/prosecco/prosECCo75/-/blob/e4831a4dbd48face399150bb1c59fefb23c4dd0b/top/charmm36s-feb2021-prosECCo75.ff/ffbonded.itp)
- [`gb.itp`](https://gitlab.com/sparkly/prosecco/prosECCo75/-/blob/e4831a4dbd48face399150bb1c59fefb23c4dd0b/top/charmm36s-feb2021-prosECCo75.ff/gb.itp)
- [`cmap.itp`](https://gitlab.com/sparkly/prosecco/prosECCo75/-/blob/e4831a4dbd48face399150bb1c59fefb23c4dd0b/top/charmm36s-feb2021-prosECCo75.ff/cmap.itp)
- [`old_c36_cmap.itp`](https://gitlab.com/sparkly/prosecco/prosECCo75/-/blob/e4831a4dbd48face399150bb1c59fefb23c4dd0b/top/charmm36s-feb2021-prosECCo75.ff/old_c36_cmap.itp)
- [`POPC_s.itp`](https://gitlab.com/sparkly/prosecco/prosECCo75/-/blob/e4831a4dbd48face399150bb1c59fefb23c4dd0b/top/lipids/PC/POPC_s.itp)

The `topol-*.top`, `cmap.gro`, and `grompp.mdp` files are minimal gmxtopology
test wrappers. See [`UPSTREAM-README.md`](UPSTREAM-README.md) for the upstream
license notice and citations, including the prosECCo75 paper:

> Nencini et al. Effective Inclusion of Electronic Polarization Improves the
> Description of Electrostatic Interactions: The prosECCo75 Biomolecular Force
> Field. J. Chem. Theory Comput. 2024, 20, 17, 7546-7559.
